case_title: BIRMINGHAM, KAREN VS BERNSTEIN, KEITH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,232.14 FILED BY BIRMINGHAM, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, DEANNA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,993.58 FILED BY BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BIRMINGHAM, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRMINGHAM, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA $1,061.66 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,133.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BIRMINGHAM, KAREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25677, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
APPEAL ORDERED DISMISSED IN SUPERIOR COURT APPELLATE AND ORDERED REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS
MATTER WAS NOT SETTLED AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT RECEIVE A NOTICE OF HEARING FROM APPELLATE COURT, THEREFORE DISMISSAL ORDERED SET ASIDE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRMINGHAM, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, THE AMOUNT FOR COSTS REPRESENTS ATTORNEY'S FEES. SCA 25677 ENTERED ON 4-15-99. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BERNSTEIN, KEITH BERNSTEIN, DEANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BIRMINGHAM, KAREN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
